full_text:
Deng Yi 鄧義
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Deng Yi (鄧義). Served under Liu Cong with Liu Xian. Surrendered to Cao Cao after Cong’s death. Deng Yi was affiliated with Liu Biao and the Wei Kingdom.
